summary: Iteration 28: Tested WhatsApp reminders enhancement features. All backend APIs working correctly. Dashboard shows 5 stat cards including 'Incasso Annuale' (yearly revenue). Reminders page shows 3 stat cards (Promemoria Domani, Scadenza Colore, Clienti Inattivi). WhatsApp pending banner correctly shows only when pending > 0. Template creation with color_expiry type works via API. Minor data inconsistency: existing 'Richiamo Colore' template has type 'color_recall' instead of 'color_expiry'.

minor.issue: Existing 'Richiamo Colore' template has type 'color_recall' instead of 'color_expiry'. Frontend expects 'color_expiry' for purple badge. New templates created via API correctly use 'color_expiry'.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' - accessibility warning, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND API TESTS (8/8 passed):
1. Login with admin@brunomelito.it / mbhs637104 - PASS
2. GET /api/stats/dashboard returns yearly_revenue and yearly_appointments - PASS
3. GET /api/reminders/tomorrow returns list - PASS
4. GET /api/reminders/color-expiry returns list - PASS
5. GET /api/reminders/inactive-clients returns list - PASS
6. GET /api/reminders/templates returns templates with color_expiry support - PASS
7. POST /api/reminders/templates creates color_expiry template - PASS
8. GET /api/reminders/auto-check returns pending info - PASS
FRONTEND UI TESTS:
9. Dashboard loads with 5 stat cards - PASS
10. Dashboard shows 'Incasso Annuale' stat card - PASS
11. WhatsApp pending banner hidden when pending=0 - PASS (correct behavior)
12. Reminders page loads with data-testid='reminders-page' - PASS
13. 3 stat cards visible: Promemoria Domani, Scadenza Colore, Clienti Inattivi - PASS
14. Message templates section shows templates with type badges - PASS
15. Template badges: Appuntamento (blue), Richiamo (orange), Scadenza Colore (purple) - PASS
16. Appuntamenti di Domani section renders - PASS
17. Clienti Inattivi section renders - PASS
18. Template creation dialog opens - PASS
19. API-created color_expiry template shows purple 'Scadenza Colore' badge - PASS
action_items: OPTIONAL: Update existing 'Richiamo Colore' template type from 'color_recall' to 'color_expiry' in database for consistency
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard stats endpoint correctly returns yearly_revenue and yearly_appointments
Reminders page correctly shows 3 stat cards with pending counts
Centro Invio WhatsApp section correctly hidden when no pending items
Template type badges correctly styled: appointment=blue, recall=orange, color_expiry=purple
Backend default templates include color_expiry type (line 112 in reminders.py)
Minor: Existing DB data has 'color_recall' type, new templates use 'color_expiry'
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted TEST_API_Color_Expiry template for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified WhatsApp reminders enhancement. Dashboard has 5 stat cards including yearly revenue. Reminders page has 3 stat cards (Promemoria Domani, Scadenza Colore, Clienti Inattivi). WhatsApp pending banner shows only when pending > 0. Template types: appointment, recall, color_expiry (purple badge). Note: existing 'Richiamo Colore' template has legacy type 'color_recall' but new templates correctly use 'color_expiry'.

whatsapp_pending_banner.behavior: Shows only when pending reminders + colors + inactive > 0

batch_send_buttons.note: Only visible when respective pending count > 0
